ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Category of the market (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock, forex) */,
  "symbol_x" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency being traded (e.g., BTC) */,
  "symbol_y" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency being quoted (e.g., USDT) */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., BTC-USDT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the market started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the market ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the instrument is traded */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of trading instrument (e.g., contract, option) */,
  "instrument_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of trading instrument (e.g., perpetual contract, futures contract) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading instrument */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the instrument */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the instrument (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the trade was executed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding order */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, long, short) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price of the market */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price of the market */,
  "bid_size" INTEGER /* Bid size of the market */,
  "ask_size" INTEGER /* Ask size of the market */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* Highest price of the market in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* Lowest price of the market in the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_24h" INTEGER /* Volume of the market in the last 24 hours */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin balance of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., cryptocurrency, economy) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the order was placed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, cancelled) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  "stop_loss_price" REAL /* Stop-loss price for the order */,
  "take_profit_price" REAL /* Take-profit price for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the position was established */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the position */,
  "position_status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., long, short) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_loss_orders" (
  "stop_loss_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-loss order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the stop-loss order was placed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stop-loss order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stop-loss order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stop-loss order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stop-loss order (e.g., open, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_loss_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_loss_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_loss_orders_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "take_profit_orders" (
  "take_profit_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each take-profit order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the take-profit order was placed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the take-profit order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the take-profit order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the take-profit order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the take-profit order (e.g., open, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("take_profit_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_take_profit_orders_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_take_profit_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "margin_trades" (
  "margin_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each margin trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the margin trade was executed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the margin trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the margin trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the margin trade */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin used for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the margin trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of margin trade (e.g., long, short) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("margin_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_margin_trades_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_margin_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trading_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading instrument being traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the trade was executed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, long, short) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
